steps.title: Substitute a repeated expression
steps.content:
The expression $3x-8$ appears twice, so let $u=3x-8$. The equation becomes a simpler quadratic.
$$u^2-11u+28=0$$

steps.title: Factor the quadratic
steps.content:
The numbers $7$ and $4$ multiply to $28$ and add to $11$.
$$u^2-11u+28=0$$
$$(u-7)(u-4)=0$$

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content:
Enter the original equation and read the solution values from the graph or solver.
$$(3x-8)^2-11(3x-8)+28=0$$
This is two values, not $45$. The answer is 4,5.
